WARFRAMEMOD-ARMOR_PLATE_POWER.title: Armor Plate
WARFRAMEMOD-ARMOR_PLATE_POWER.descriptio: When this creature loses a certain amount of HP, it becomes [gold]stunned[/gold], then gains [gold]Strength[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-ARMOR_PLATE_POWER.extraDescr: When [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] loses [blue]{DisplayAmount}[/blue] more HP, it becomes [gold]stunned[/gold], then gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-BANISHMENT_POWER.title: Banishment
WARFRAMEMOD-BANISHMENT_POWER.description: [gold]Stunned[/gold] at the beginning of each turn.
WARFRAMEMOD-BANISHMENT_POWER.smartDescri: [gold]Stunned[/gold] at the beginning of each turn. Lasts for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}.

WARFRAMEMOD-BRIGHT_BONNET_POWER.title: Bright Bonnet

WARFRAMEMOD-CELESTIAL_TWIN.title: Celestial Twin
WARFRAMEMOD-CELESTIAL_TWIN.description:
Whenever you play an Attack that costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)} or more, play and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a random Skill from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Whenever you play a Skill that costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)} or more, play and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a random Attack from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

Whenever you play a Skill that costs {Amount:energyIcons()} or more, play and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a random Attack from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

WARFRAMEMOD-COLD_POWER.title: Cold
WARFRAMEMOD-COLD_POWER.description: Frozen creatures deal [blue]15%[/blue] less damage and receive an additional [blue]15%[/blue] damage. Whenever having [blue]10[/blue] Cold, they will be [gold]Stunned[/gold]. Each turn, Cold is reduced by [blue]1[/blue].

WARFRAMEMOD-DISPENSARY_POWER.title: Dispensary

1. Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
2. Heal 1 HP.
3. Add a random card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
